creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
I made the requirements / workflow clear in share/doc/pjdfstest/README in this commit:

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/share/doc/pjdfstest/README?revision=274016&view=markup

I also added code to enforce that the tests be run as root:

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/tests/sys/pjdfstest/tests/pjdfstest.test.mk?revision=274016&view=markup&pathrev=274016#l11

Will MFC contrib/pjdfstest and associated commits back to 10-STABLE.
